calendar.matters:
Petitioners Charles Schwab & Co., Inc., And Keith Robinson'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Petitioners Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. and Keith Robinson's petition to confirm arbitration award set aside -- Ruling granting petitioner's petition to confirm arbitration award and for entry of judgment on 7/1/03 is vacated. The petiton was erroneously calendared for 7/1/03. Petitioner's petition is now granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(REQ/301/JU) Reporter: Susan K. Crozier, CSR # 4761
